title: Everbuild EVBGPSCL General Purpose Silicone Sealant, Clear, 280 ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
WATERPROOF SEAL – Provides a strong waterproof seal in kitchens and bathrooms around sinks, showers, baths, toilets, work surfaces, and laminates.
ANTI-FUNGAL – Includes anti-fungal ingredients for mould prevention in high-humidity areas like bathrooms and kitchens.
VERSATILE – This adaptable sealant can be used as an adhesive to secure PVCu trims, cladding, and panels.
CERTIFIED – Meets the European standard EN15651 for façade, cold climate and sanitary applications in compliance with the Construction Product Regulation.
EASY TO APPLY – Apply using a caulk, sealant/adhesive cartridge application gun such as the Everbuild Power Pro Heavy Duty Sealant / Professional Sealant Gun.
AVAILABLE IN A RANGE OF COLOURS – Available in black, brown, grey and white. Clear and white are also available in an 80ml Easi Squeeze tube.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? Seal only two sides of the joint to maintain flexibility. Use masking tape on both sides for a cleaner, neater finish. Cut the cartridge tip carefully, preserving the thread. Attach nozzle and cut at a 45° angle, with an opening just larger than the gap to seal. Use a standard sealant gun. Apply with even pressure on the trigger, keeping the gun at a constant angle to the surface for best results. Smooth down the sealant within 15 minutes of application with a sealant smoothing tool. Remove the masking tape after 5 minutes of application. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products.
